evidence_method: Direct SQLite queries on prisma/dev.db post-normalization

StockQuote.anomalies: ~10 ETF rows with 1970-12-04 epoch date (pre-existing, not new)
StockQuote.notes: Date format 100% ISO after normalization; 185 symbols with ≥500 trading days

MarketIndex.notes: 100% ISO after normalization; TAIEX refreshed +32 rows; 766 distinct trading days exceeds 500d requirement

InstitutionalChip.backfill_status: SCRIPT_EXISTS_BUT_NEEDS_FIX (requires twstock module unavailable in current Python env)
InstitutionalChip.notes: Only 236 trading days (~1 year). P4-04 needs ≥500 days of chip data. Backfill blocked by missing twstock module.

MonthlyRevenue.schema_note: Uses year/month integer columns — NOT a date string; excluded from date normalization (correct behavior)
MonthlyRevenue.notes: Only 1 year of revenue data. P4-04 fundamental analysis requires historical revenue trends.

FinancialReport.schema_note: Uses year/quarter integer columns — NOT a date string; excluded from date normalization (correct behavior)
FinancialReport.notes: Only 2025 financial data. Historical P&L / balance sheet needed for P4-04.

IndustrySectorMapping.method: TWSE numeric code 01–38, 91 → Chinese name → GICS-like sector group
IndustrySectorMapping.cross_table_join: industry_code column in Stock table links to MarketIndex sector name via string pattern
IndustrySectorMapping.notes: Sufficient for basic sector grouping in regime classifier. Not official TWSE crosswalk table.

readiness_verdicts.p4_02_reason: StockQuote 100% ISO, 185 symbols ≥500 days, MarketIndex JOIN safe
readiness_verdicts.p4_03_reason: TAIEX 766 days (>500), freshness gap 1 day, all dates ISO, JOIN safe with StockQuote
p4_04_blockers: InstitutionalChip only 236 trading days (need ≥500) — backfill requires twstock module fix
T-05 walk-forward must be redesigned as portfolio-level (H001-H012 retired)

p1_action_items: Fix bulk-history-sync.py environment (twstock or alternative) for InstitutionalChip backfill
